title: GachaCrate
body:
Gacha Crate is a fully GUI-based, modern crate plugin for Minecraft 1.20+.
Create, manage, and customize beautiful crates entirely in-game — no config editing required.

✨ Stunning animations & particle effects
🎁 Powerful reward system (items, commands, rarities, pity)
🎮 Full in-game editor via /gacha
⚙️ PlaceholderAPI, DecentHolograms & FancyHolograms support

Perfect for modern servers that want polished and professional crates.
